name: @zeropg/server
description: Standalone dedicated-Postgres server for zeropg: one scale-to-zero container holding the lease + PGlite + ObjectStoreFS, exposing the real Postgres wire protocol (pglite-socket) on a local port, a default-on PostgREST auto-REST API, and an HTTP control face (/wake, /ready, POST /sql) a remote app connects to.
